entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop cultivated in India experiencing transformations in production environments

entities.description: The environmental conditions and characteristics surrounding pearl millet production

entities.name: DISTRICT LEVEL DATA
entities.description: Data collected at the district level from 1998 to 2017 used for characterization

entities.description: A statistical method used to characterize the pearl millet production environment

entities.name: CROP MODEL SIMULATIONS
entities.description: Large-scale simulations used to reflect the pearl millet production system

entities.name: TARGET POPULATION ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Five distinct environments (TPEs) used to divide pearl millet cultivation

entities.description: An Indian state where pearl millet cultivation has grown
